title: System Design for Beginners (Full Guide)
summary: AWS Developers presents a structured 7-step framework for system design interviews that prioritizes problem understanding over technology selection. The approach covers requirements gathering, traffic estimation, high-level component design, API contracts, tech stack selection, and implementation constraints using a URL shortener as example.
writeup: This guide from AWS Developers lays out a 7-step framework for approaching system design interviews, with the central premise that understanding the problem should come before picking technologies. The steps span requirements gathering, traffic estimation, high-level component design, API contracts, tech stack selection, and implementation constraints, illustrated throughout with a URL shortener as the worked example. The takeaway is a repeatable sequence that defers technology decisions until requirements and scale are pinned down.
